product_overview: ANTIGRAVITY is a gamified personal performance OS that scores daily activity across habits, study, fitness, nutrition, sleep and side projects, then visualizes progress with charts, heatmaps and a persistent Aura Points economy. It combines offline-first state with optional cloud sync and a built-in marketplace for spending earned Aura Points.
core_goals: Help users track and complete daily permanent habits to increase their daily score and lifetime Aura Points.
Make it fast to log activity across workout, study, nutrition, sleep and mood so users can maintain streaks and see immediate score/rank feedback.
Provide a single-day and historical view of performance with charts and a calendar heatmap to discover trends and streaks.
Enable users to spend earned Aura Points in an in-app marketplace and compare progress via a private leaderboard.
Support offline-first usage with local persistence and optional cloud sync so users can use the app anywhere.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Sign in or create an account to access a personalized dashboard, local persistence and optional cloud sync.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Choose to sign in -> Fill in credentials -> Submit login form -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to /auth -> Choose to sign up -> Fill required profile fields -> Submit signup form -> See onboarding or dashboard at /

features.name: Dashboard (Daily Score & Rank)
features.description: One-place overview showing today's computed score, rank badge, Aura Points delta, key charts (radar, weekly bar) and today's permanent task list.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See today's score and rank badge -> Inspect radar chart to review axis stats -> Inspect weekly bar+line chart to review last 7 days
Navigate to / -> Scroll to today's permanent tasks -> See each habit's completion state and contribution to today's score

features.name: Habits (Permanent Daily Tasks)
features.description: View and complete permanent daily habits, track streaks and influence the daily score and Aura Points.
user_flows: Navigate to /habits -> See list of permanent daily habits with current streaks -> Mark habit as complete -> See habit streak increment -> See today's score update on /

features.name: Task Management (Add / Edit / Delete Tasks)
features.description: Create, edit and remove tasks with configurable type, weight and completion method so users can tailor scoring to their routines.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Open Task Manager -> Start Add Task -> Fill task details (type, weight, completion method) -> Submit form -> See new task appear in /habits
Navigate to /settings -> Open Task Manager -> Start Edit Task -> Change weight or completion method -> Save changes -> See updated task reflected in /habits
Navigate to /settings -> Open Task Manager -> Start Add Task -> Submit form with empty required name -> See validation error that task name is required

features.name: Workout Logging
features.description: Log workouts and muscle-group activity to contribute to daily score and view progress per group over time.
user_flows: Navigate to /workout -> See muscle group grid and recent logs -> Start a workout log entry -> Enter exercise details and duration -> Save workout -> See workout reflected in weekly bar and today's score

features.name: Study Sessions & Timers
features.description: Track study sessions, record durations per subject and accumulate progress toward study goals and daily score.
user_flows: Navigate to /study -> See subject cards with progress rings -> Start a study timer for a subject -> Stop timer when finished -> See logged duration added to subject progress and today's score

features.name: Nutrition Logging
features.description: Log meals and macros, see daily macro rings and calorie progress that factor into the daily score.
user_flows: Navigate to /nutrition -> See macro rings and today's consumed totals -> Add a meal entry with macros -> Save meal -> See macro rings update and today's score adjust

features.name: Sleep Tracking
features.description: Record sleep sessions and quality to influence daily recovery metrics and the overall score.
user_flows: Navigate to /sleep -> See sleep summary and target schedule -> Add a sleep session with duration and quality rating -> Save session -> See sleep chart update and today's score reflect sleep contribution

features.name: Mood Journaling
features.description: Log daily mood/energy ratings and see stress↔effectiveness waves influencing score and bonus Aura Points.
user_flows: Navigate to /mood -> See mood wave visual and recent entries -> Log today's mood rating and notes -> Save mood -> See mood reflected in wave chart and any applicable bonus in today's score

features.name: Goals (Monthly & Temporary)
features.description: Create and track longer-term goals with progress rings and timelines that contribute to planning and score weighting.
user_flows: Navigate to /goals -> See current monthly and temporary goals with progress rings -> Create a new goal with target and timeframe -> Save goal -> See goal appear in the goals list and be included in score weighting

features.name: Side Hustles & Projects
features.description: Manage side projects with task breakdowns and progress so users can allocate score weight to creative or freelance work.
user_flows: Navigate to /sidehustles -> See project cards and open a project -> Add a subtask or update progress within project -> Save changes -> See project progress update and affect weekly metrics

features.name: Command (Quick Actions)
features.description: Use a quick command interface to perform fast actions like marking habits complete or starting timers without navigating deep into pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /command -> Type a quick action intent (e.g. complete habit or start study timer) -> Execute the command -> See the target habit or timer reflect the change in the app

features.name: Calendar (Heatmap & Day Details)
features.description: Browse the full-year heatmap to inspect historical daily scores and open a day to see what was completed that day.
user_flows: Navigate to /calendar -> See calendar heatmap with color tiers for each day -> Select a day cell in the heatmap -> See day detail drawer with that day's tasks and score breakdown

features.name: Aura History & Leaderboard
features.description: View lifetime Aura Points history, weekly summaries and a private leaderboard showing self-ranked progress and top-three podium.
user_flows: Navigate to /history -> See Aura history timeline with daily net AP -> Inspect a bar to see earned vs lost breakdown for a day
Navigate to /leaderboard -> See Top Three Podium and Self Rank card -> Review weekly Aura summary and streak multiplier progress

features.name: Marketplace (Shop)
features.description: Spend earned Aura Points on digital rewards and assets inside the app using the Shop.
user_flows: Navigate to /shop -> Browse reward cards and their AP costs -> Select a reward to purchase -> Confirm purchase -> See AP deduction reflected in total Aura Points on the dashboard

features.name: Cloud Sync & Offline Mode
features.description: Operate offline-first with local persistence and optionally sync data to the Supabase backend; users can toggle offline behavior and monitor sync status.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Toggle offline mode -> See sync status icon in header update to reflect offline or syncing state
Navigate to /settings -> Enable cloud sync -> Make activity changes locally -> See sync status icon indicate data will be synced (local observation)

features.name: Settings & Preferences
features.description: Adjust profile, score weights, rank thresholds and notification preferences to calibrate how activity contributes to score and appearance of the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Open Profile Section -> Update display name or avatar -> Save changes -> See profile updated across the app
Navigate to /settings -> Open Score Weight Editor -> Adjust a category weight -> Save changes -> See subsequent scores use updated weights in computed daily score

features.name: Aura Gamification
features.description: Earn Aura Points (AP) by completing habits and tasks

features.name: Cloud Sync
features.description: Offline-first synchronization with Supabase backend
user_interactions: See sync status icon in header

features.name: Marketplace
features.description: Spend Aura Points on digital rewards and assets
